name: WUXI BIOLOGICS CAYMAN INC
summary: WUXI BIOLOGICS CAYMAN INC is a leading global contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO) providing end-to-end services for biologics drug development and manufacturing. The company offers services from cell line development to commercial manufacturing, enabling pharmaceutical and biotech companies to accelerate their drug development programs. Wuxi Biologics is headquartered in Wuxi, China.
